flashcards.definition: S-shaped, increasing from (−1, −π/2) to (1, π/2), passing through the origin.
Horizontal asymptotes at y = −π/2 (left) and y = π/2 (right).
The graph of f⁻¹ is the reflection of f over the line y = x.
Increasing S-curve from bottom-left to top-right, always between y = −π/2 and y = π/2.
